channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government considers removing 1pc export advance tax in upcoming budget amid industry pressure
item.description: The government is reportedly considering abolishing the 1pc advance tax imposed on exporters in the upcoming federal budget, a move that could provide around Rs100 billion in relief to the export sect...

item.title: Tinubu Defends Fuel Subsidy Removal, Says Economic Reforms Are Improving Nigeria’s Finances
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has defended his administration’s decision to remove fuel subsidy, saying the policy helped Nigeria avoid a serious fiscal crisis and created the foundation for economic recovery...

item.title: San Francisco homeowner sues robotics start-up over property damage during Airbnb stay
item.description: A San Francisco homeowner has filed a lawsuit seeking over $12,000 in damages after a multi-billion-dollar robotics start-up allegedly caused extensive damage to his Airbnb rental. The case, lodged in...

item.title: Cosplay couple Awie and Prince De Guzman share how makeup enhances their relationship
item.description: Cosplay couple Awie and Prince De Guzman recently opened up about how their shared love for makeup has strengthened their relationship. Both passionate about cosplay, the pair spend significant time p...

item.title: 33 Suspects Arraigned Over Ebonyi Communal Clash and Killings
item.description: In Ebonyi State, Nigeria, a state high court in Abakaliki arraigned 33 suspects connected to a deadly communal clash between Amasiri Community in Afikpo Local Government Area and Okporojo community in...

item.title: Supreme Court mandates strict timelines for bail decisions and judgment delivery in High Courts
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has issued strong nationwide directions aimed at reducing judicial delays, particularly in bail matters that involve personal liberty. In a landmark judgment delivered under...

item.title: AAP sweeps nearly half of Punjab’s wards, viewed as a prelude to 2027 assembly polls
item.description: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) secured a commanding performance in Punjab’s civic body elections, winning 954 out of 1,977 wards, amounting to over 48 percent of seats. The Congress trailed with 393 wards,...

item.title: Report raises questions on Tesla’s self-driving safety claims and internal AI training practices
item.description: A Reuters investigation reports that Tesla’s claims about the safety of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) system are being questioned by former employees and researchers. The company has repeatedly stated t...

item.title: Judge reviews legality of $1.8 billion compensation fund tied to Trump-related IRS settlement
item.description: A federal judge has ordered attorneys representing President Donald Trump and his family to address serious allegations concerning an unusual settlement agreement linked to the Internal Revenue Servic...

item.title: US continues Iran ceasefire negotiations while Israel and Lebanon hold rare military talks in Washington
item.description: The United States is actively engaged in ongoing diplomatic efforts to secure a ceasefire and broader peace arrangement involving Iran, even as significant differences remain unresolved. According to ...

item.title: Stormers welcome key returns ahead of URC quarter-final against Cardiff in Cape Town
item.description: The Stormers head into their United Rugby Championship (URC) quarter-final against Cardiff at DHL Stadium with renewed confidence after a turbulent but ultimately encouraging week in camp. Their prepa...

item.title: NGF Endorses ₦100,000 Minimum Wage Proposal Amid Rising Cost of Living
item.description: The Nigeria Governors Forum (NGF) has proposed a new national minimum wage of ₦100,000 as part of ongoing discussions on workers’ welfare and the impact of rising living costs across the country. The ...

item.title: Railway services in Balochistan resume after temporary three-day suspension following security disruption
item.description: Pakistan Railways has announced the resumption of train services to and from Balochistan after a three-day suspension that had disrupted connectivity across the region. Officials confirmed on Friday t...

item.title: Police seek whereabouts of registered child sex offender who breached reporting obligations
item.description: Queensland police are searching for a known child sex offender whose current whereabouts are unknown after he failed to comply with mandatory reporting requirements. Authorities have identified the ma...

item.title: Dozens evacuated as fire breaks out in downtown Calgary high-rise
item.description: A fire broke out in a downtown Calgary high-rise on Friday afternoon, forcing dozens of residents to evacuate their homes. According to the Calgary Fire Department, crews were called to the building i...

item.title: Thieves smash into Baldivis shopping centre to steal ATM
item.description: Police have released footage showing a daring ram raid at a shopping centre in Baldivis, Western Australia. In the incident, a vehicle was used to forcibly enter the premises with the intention of ste...

item.title: Canada's Supreme Court clarifies exceptions to Jordan time limits for complex criminal trials
item.description: The Supreme Court of Canada has issued a clarified framework for when criminal trials can exceed the Jordan time limits, reaffirming that most trials must still adhere to the 18-month (provincial cour...

item.title: Tanzania observes national farewell for Mama Suzana Magufuli amid mourning period
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has officially overseen the final journey and funeral arrangements for Mama Suzana Magufuli, the mother of the late former President John Pombe Magufuli. Her passing has mar...

item.title: Karina Bautista grieves the death of her pet dog Billy and shares emotional tribute online
item.description: Karina Bautista, a Filipino celebrity known for her strong bond with her pets, has publicly shared her grief following the passing of her beloved fur baby, Billy. The French Bulldog, who was described...

item.title: Costs of hosting World Cup matches in Vancouver vary depending on accounting methods
item.description: The article examines the financial implications of hosting FIFA World Cup matches in Vancouver as part of the 2026 tournament and highlights that the overall cost is not straightforward to calculate. ...
